# Masterful

> Masterful is a search visibility studio offering SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). The service helps businesses appear in AI-generated search answers across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

## Services

- [SEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/seo/): Technical SEO, content strategy, topical authority for Google rankings.
- [AEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/): Pages that ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini cite by name. Prompt mapping, schema, model benchmarking.
  - [AEO for ChatGPT](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/chatgpt/): Citation work tuned to ChatGPT's retrieval signals: Reddit, Wikipedia, and editorial publications.
  - [AEO for Perplexity](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/perplexity/): Earning the editorial and primary-source slots Perplexity attributes next to every answer.
  - [AEO for Google AI Overviews](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/google-ai-overviews/): Appearing above the blue links when Google's AI Overviews replace the click.
  - [AEO for Gemini](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/gemini/): Visibility across Google's AI Overviews, the Gemini app, and Workspace.
  - [AEO for Microsoft Copilot](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/copilot/): LinkedIn-led citation work for Copilot inside Microsoft 365, Edge, and Windows.
  - [AEO for Claude](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo/claude/): Verifiable expertise signals that earn citation from the AI technical buyers trust.
- [GEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/geo/): Entity building on Wikipedia, Wikidata, and reference sources AI models read during training.

## How It Works

- [Process](https://masterful-app.com/process/): Five-phase engagement from free audit through foundation work to velocity.
- [Free Audit](https://masterful-app.com/audit/): Six-question form. 18-page visibility report within 48 hours. Covers 6 AI tools, top 50 buyer prompts, competitor citation map, 90-day roadmap.

## Journal

- [Journal](https://masterful-app.com/journal/): Published methodology and insights on SEO, AEO, and GEO.
